description: Portfolio construction and optimisation engine for FX systematic strategies. Implements risk-parity, mean-variance (Markowitz), Black-Litterman, and hierarchical risk parity (HRP) allocation frameworks. Supports real-time portfolio rebalancing with configurable threshold bands and transaction cost constraints. For AUD/USD, the engine provides commodity-correlation-aware allocation that adjusts position sizing based on rolling iron-ore and copper betas. Computes portfolio-level analytics including Sharpe ratio, maximum drawdown, turnover, and risk contribution decomposition across all G10 FX pairs. Integrates with the execution engine for automated rebalancing order generation.
endpoints:
POST /api/v2/portfolio/optimise — run portfolio optimisation
GET /api/v2/portfolio/{portfolioId} — current portfolio state and analytics
POST /api/v2/portfolio/rebalance — trigger portfolio rebalance
GET /api/v2/portfolio/{portfolioId}/risk-decomposition — risk contribution by position
GET /api/v2/portfolio/{portfolioId}/backtest — historical backtest results
